vulnerabilities.description: See CVE-2026-33870 entry on netty-codec-http. Mirrored for sibling transport artifact so scanners receive the same not_affected statement.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: No action required. Liquibase does not run an HTTP server.

ratings.justification: Server-side HTTP vulnerability in a transport-only sibling artifact.

analysis.detail: Scanner over-match: same root assessment as netty-codec-http (see above). netty-transport-classes-epoll provides Linux epoll(7) native transport classes — no HTTP parser code. The cpe:2.3:a:netty:netty:* CPE causes OWASP to propagate the CVE here. Liquibase does not expose any HTTP server; the vulnerable chunked-encoding decoder is unreachable from this artifact regardless.

vulnerabilities.description: See CVE-2026-33871 entry on netty-codec-http2. Mirrored for sibling transport artifact.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: No action required. Liquibase does not run an HTTP/2 server.

ratings.justification: Server-side HTTP/2 vulnerability in a transport-only sibling artifact.

analysis.detail: Scanner over-match: same root assessment as netty-codec-http2 (see above). netty-transport-classes-epoll is the Linux epoll native transport — no HTTP/2 frame decoder. CPE-based scanners propagate the CVE here despite the artifact not containing the vulnerable parser.
